case_title: THAI, PETER VS HSU, DANNY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $547.00 FILED BY THAI, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, DANNY YU, MIAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YU, MIAO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAI, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSU, DANNY YU, MIAO $547.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $594.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANTS: HSU, DANNY & YU, MIAO
RECORD ON APPEAL DELIVERED TO SCA 20325. NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAI, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSU, DANNY YU, MIAO $471.29 PRINCIPAL, $47.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $519.04, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 20325 ON 10-4-90. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DANNY HSU RETURNED UNDELIVERABLE, NO FORWARDING ORDER ON FILE.
